description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a "schedules-sync" stage using the Ruby environment inherited from .ruby-before_script. Define a hidden base job .base-schedules-sync that retries twice and runs the exact command "bundle exec bin/manage_schedules --token $GITLAB_BOT_API_TOKEN_ON_COM $EXTRA_ARGS". Add a "dry-run:schedules-sync" job that extends the base, sets allow_failure to true, defines the variable EXTRA_ARGS as "--dry-run", and is triggered either by changes to pipeline-schedules.yml when $GITLAB_BOT_API_TOKEN_ON_COM and $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID are present or manually. Add a "schedules-sync" job that also extends the base and runs only when the commit ref name is "master", the pipeline source is not "schedule", and $GITLAB_BOT_API_TOKEN_ON_COM is set.
